techcrunch.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary.
techcrunch.summary: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

techcrunch.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
techcrunch.summary: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.

techcrunch.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
techcrunch.summary: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience powered and standalone Siri app.

techcrunch.title: RSI is the new AGI — and it’s just as hard to pin down
techcrunch.summary: A new crop of AI labs are focused on recursive self-improvement — but the goal is proving elusive.

techcrunch.title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Databricks’ co-founder on what kills enterprise AI deals
techcrunch.summary: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.

techcrunch.title: YouTube adds new podcast features, including an AI recommendation tool and ‘Auto speed’
techcrunch.summary: The update signals YouTube's ongoing efforts to compete with other platforms for podcast audiences.

techcrunch.title: 2 days left: Lock in ticket savings of up to $410 to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
techcrunch.summary: Savings of up to $410 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 tickets end tomorrow, May 29, 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now to save and join 10,000+ tech leaders on October 13-15 in San Francisco.

techcrunch.title: Visa invests in Replit to power agentic payments for developers
techcrunch.summary: Visa said that over 1,000 employees has been using Replit for prototyping and development

techcrunch.title: Has the hunt for AI compute uncovered the next Cerebras?
techcrunch.summary: General Compute is betting SambaNova will be the next breakout chipmaker.

techcrunch.title: Vertu wants CEOs to run companies from an AI foldable starting at $6,880
techcrunch.summary: Built on top of the open source Hermes project, Vertu's new foldable combines AI-agent workflows, enterprise integrations, and ultra-premium luxury finishes.
